name: Does Utah workers comp cover if I was partly at fault in the accident?
description: Yes, no-fault ignores your partial fault.[1]

mainEntity.name: Does Utah workers comp cover if I was partly at fault in the accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, no-fault ignores your partial fault.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah's no-fault system covers regardless of your fault, as long as work-related.[1][2] Fault irrelevant for benefits.[1] Key factors: Confirm on-job occurrence; report timely. Practical guidance: Don't admit fault to insurer; focus on facts. Benefits same even if careless.[2] No-fault simplifies claims.[1]
